heading: Relative rank of officers when serving with Army, Navy, or Air Force
label: 3062 Relative rank of officers when serving with Army, Navy, or Air Force
text: When serving with the Army, Navy, or Air Force, an officer of the Administration shall rank with and after officers of corresponding grade in the Army, Navy, or Air Force of the same length of service in grade. Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to affect or alter an officer’s rates of pay and allowances when not assigned to military duty.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 856 of this titlePub. L. 107–372
